name: codex-imagen
description: Generate images from Codex using the same API configuration and API key already stored in CODEX_HOME.

interface.shortDescription: Generate GPT images through Codex's existing API config.
interface.longDescription: Codex Imagen standardizes image generation from Codex by providing a skill and script that reuse CODEX_HOME config.toml, auth.json, and OpenAI-compatible API settings without a separate plugin-specific key.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image from this prompt.
Make image variants with Codex Imagen.
